description: Standard: expand thin passage with supplied material

input.additional_material: Quote from a climate scientist: 'The problem is not that we lack the technology to reduce emissions — it is that the economic incentives still favor extraction over transition.'
input.text: Global carbon emissions reached a new record in 2025. Despite international pledges to reduce fossil fuel consumption, demand for oil and gas has continued to rise. Several countries have missed their Paris Agreement targets.
The new hospital wing opened last month.

input.additional_material: Quote from a French smallholder farmer: 'Brussels sends us forms. What we need is a price for our wheat that covers the cost of growing it.'
input.text: Small farmers across the EU are struggling to compete under the reformed Common Agricultural Policy. The new subsidy structure rewards large-scale operations and environmental compliance measures that require capital most smallholders do not have. Farmer protests have spread across France, Germany, and the Netherlands.
